subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! When any soul findeth release from this mortal world, it behooveth all to celebrate and rejoice, not to sigh in grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی هر نفسی از اینجهان فانی رهاای یابد باید که جشن و سرور گرفت نه آه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
